title: exacum quitense
intro: Exacum quitense is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, commonly known as the yellow gentian. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. Exacum quitense has been found to have various health benefits, including the treatment of digestive issues, fever reduction, and relief from respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Exacum quitense typically include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
